claim: Claude Code with MCP (Model Context Protocol) enables standardized tool integration across different AI systems
actionable: Standardize your tool integrations using MCP format so they work across Claude, other LLMs, and agent frameworks
source_title: Anthropic Just Revealed The Best Claude Code Setup

claim: Composable skills with MCP allow agents to discover and use tools dynamically without hardcoding tool definitions
actionable: Build MCP servers for your domain-specific tools, allowing agents to query available tools and their schemas at runtime
source_title: Anthropic Just Revealed The Best Claude Code Setup

claim: Context window optimization in Claude Code comes from smart tool selection—only expose relevant tools for each task
actionable: Categorize tools by task type and only load relevant tool definitions (via MCP) at runtime to keep context lean
source_title: Anthropic Just Revealed The Best Claude Code Setup

claim: Real-time feedback loops (REPL output, browser screenshots) are essential for agent self-correction
actionable: Ensure your agent receives immediate feedback from each tool call (stdout, error messages, visual output) to enable iterative refinement
source_title: Anthropic Just Revealed The Best Claude Code Setup
